metadata.title: ZetisLabs — Automation tools you actually own
metadata.description: We build custom automation systems for companies losing time on repetitive processes. Proprietary code, one-time payment, you own everything.

metadata.title: Contact — ZetisLabs
metadata.description: Let's talk about your processes. Book a free 30-minute audit or send us a message: we'll tell you what to automate and how much time you can save.

contact.title: Let's talk about your processes
contact.subtitle: Got a task that wastes your time? Describe it in a couple of lines, or book a free 30-minute audit right away.

form.heading: Send us a message

message.label: Your message
message.placeholder: Which task would you like to automate?

form.subject: Contact request — {name}

errors.name: Please enter your name
errors.message: Tell us a few words about your need

form.success: Your email app will open with your message pre-filled. Just hit send.

call.heading: Book a call
call.description: 30 minutes, free and no commitment. We analyze your processes and spot your quick wins.

title.trail: Not tools that bill you for it.

hero.subtitle: We build custom automation systems for companies losing time on repetitive processes. Proprietary code, one-time payment, you own everything.

whatWeDo.lead: We take a process that costs you time — tender monitoring, data extraction, document analysis — and turn it into an automated system.
whatWeDo.body: No generic SaaS. No subscription idling away for years. Code you own, that runs on your side, and that you understand.

capabilities.title: Tender tracking
capabilities.body: Track the public tenders that match your business.

capabilities.title: Data extraction
capabilities.body: Pull the key data out of a complex document in seconds.

capabilities.title: Tool integration
capabilities.body: Connect your tools to each other to remove manual work.

whyNotSaas.rent: Most automation tools rent you access. You pay every month, you depend on their platform, and the day they change their pricing or shut down, you start over from scratch.
whyNotSaas.ownLead: At Zetislabs, we build, we deliver, and
whyNotSaas.closing: It costs more upfront than a €30/month subscription. It costs less over two years. And you depend on no one.

howWeWork.thesis: From the first call to delivered code, you see everything.

steps.title: We talk through your problem
steps.body: We pinpoint the process that eats the most time.

steps.title: We build
steps.body: You see the result at every step. No black box.

steps.title: We deliver
steps.body: Source code, documentation, training. It's all yours. 60 days of support included.

primary.name: Veille AO
primary.description: Never miss a public tender that matches your profile.

cta.title: Is a process costing you time?
